subject: DevOps
title: DevOps at Netflix
description: Learn DevOps at Netflix in one minute.

hook.text: Netflix deploys thousands of times a day to serve 250 million subscribers. How do they stay stable?

buildup.text: They built Spinnaker for continuous delivery and Chaos Monkey to randomly kill production servers.

discovery.text: Chaos engineering forces resilience. If your system can survive random failures, planned changes are easy.

twist.text: Netflix gives engineers full ownership. No central ops team. You build it, you run it, you fix it at 3 AM.

climax.text: Freedom plus responsibility. Engineers choose their tools but own the consequences of their choices.

punchline.text: Netflix trusts engineers fully. Chaos makes them reliable.

quiz.question: What does Netflix's Chaos Monkey do?
options: Randomly kills production servers to test resilience
